Meaning.En: The upper interior surface of a room, typically constructed from plaster, drywall, or wood.
Meaning.Example: The ceiling in the living room was painted white to make the space feel larger.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả bề mặt trên cùng bên trong của một căn phòng.
Situation.En: Describing the top interior surface of a room, especially in architectural or interior design contexts.

Meaning.Vi: Mức tối đa, giới hạn (thường dùng trong kinh tế, tài chính)
Meaning.En: The maximum level or limit allowed for something, especially in economic or financial contexts.
Meaning.Example: The government imposed a salary ceiling to control public sector wage inflation.

Situation.Vi: Dùng khi nói về ngưỡng giới hạn tối đa trong chính sách hoặc quy định.
Situation.En: Used when referring to a maximum allowable level, such as in wage caps, price controls, or budget limits.
